fun_fact: Started producing in their college dorm room, using only a broken synth and a laptop.
Actually a duo of brothers who only record music between 2 AM and 4 AM.
The lead guitarist is a former electrical engineer who builds all of their own pedals.
Uses field recordings of actual rainstorms from around the world in every track.
A certified personal trainer who tests all tracks in their own spin classes before releasing.
Partnered with a space agency to broadcast their debut album to a nearby star system.
Records all music on vintage analog tape to get that authentic crackle.
They famously refuse to wear shoes during live performances to 'feel the stage'.
A totally anonymous collective; they perform live behind LED masks.
Lives on a working farm and often incorporates barn noises into the background.
Was completely deaf when he composed some of his greatest works, including the 9th Symphony.
Writes all of their beats using pure code in a custom programming language.
Their drum kit is made entirely out of salvaged motorcycle parts.
Writes most of their songs while stargazing in the desert.
Started as a busker in the subway and got discovered by a major label executive.
All their song titles are named after real exoplanets.
